title: Morphy Richards EverCosy Premium Fleece Heated Electric Under Blanket, Teddy, Double, 150x122cm, 9 Settings, Adjustble Timer, 3p/hour Cost, Machine Washable, Auto Shut Off, 600021
features: Personalised Cosy Warmth – 9 Heat Settings and Timer: Snuggle into your absolute temperature with 9 adjustable heat settings 20–57℃ and a 1–9 hour timer, whether you need gentle warmth or a toasty boost, this heated underblanket offers tailored comfort all night long

Peace of Mind with Overheat Protection and Auto Shut-Off: Designed with your safety in mind, this electric blanket features advanced overheat protection and an automatic shut-off function so you can relax and drift off worry-free

Energy Efficient and Cost-Saving Comfort Stay warm for less: Using just around 3p per hour on setting 1, this energy-efficient heated blanket helps reduce heating bills by warming you directly ideal for lowering your thermostat without sacrificing comfort

Ultra-Soft Teddy Fleece and Polyester Blend: Crafted from a luxuriously soft teddy fleece and durable polyester, this underblanket feels snug and gentle against your skin, the breathable fabric ensures long-lasting comfort and warmth throughout the seasons

Easy to Clean and Maintain – Machine Washable:Thanks to the detachable controller, this electric underblanket is fully machine washable keeping it fresh, hygienic, and ready for cosy nights again and again
description: From the manufacturer Energy Efficient Costs approximately 3p per hour when on setting 1. Personalised Warmth The single detachable controller offers 9 temperature settings ranging from 20-53℃. Safe & Reliable Design Includes overheat protection and will automatically shut off for peace of mind and safety. Machine Washable For Hygiene The detachable controller means it can be machine washed to maintain cleanliness. Soft Material Crafted from a soft polyester for a cosy and durable feel.
